arts.ttl: Broken toe to sideline Mainz's Hanche-Olsen for weeks
arts.sum: FSV Mainz 05 have confirmed more hard-luck injury news for Norwegian central defender Andreas Hanche-Olsen.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig head coach Marco Rose talks title aspirations, Jürgen Klopp and more
arts.sum: During the international break, bundesliga.com sat down with the 48-year-old to discuss his time at the club so far, his team's unbeaten start to 2024/25 and Jürgen Klopp's Red Bull appointment and much more... RB Leipzig head coach Marco Rose is aiming to clinch the club's first Bundesliga title.

arts.ttl: Mainz vs RB Leipzig preview: Visitors look to claim top spot
arts.sum: Mainz host an unbeaten RB Leipzig at the Mewa Arena in matchweek seven, looking to disrupt the momentum of a visiting team aiming to take sole possession of the Bundesliga top spot after Saturday’s encounter.

arts.ttl: Preview: Mainz 05 vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Mainz 05 and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face HUGE competition in Benjamin Sesko chase
arts.sum: Manchester United will rival Arsenal in the race to sign RB Leipzig forward Benjamin Sesko next summer. “We need to work a little bit on his first touch because if you want to be at the top, top, top, top and achieve the next level in every competition, the first touch, in my opinion, is really important,” the RB Leipzig managing director for sport admitted.
